markdown:
# Rod of Alertness

- **Type**: RD|XDMG
- **Weight**: 2 lb.

This rod has the following properties.

## Alertness

While holding the rod, you have [[advantage]] on Wisdom ([[perception]]) checks and on [[initiative]] rolls. Spells. While holding the rod, you can cast the following spells from it:

- [[detect_evil_and_good Evil and Good]]
- [[detect_magic Magic]]
- [[detect_poison_and_disease Poison and Disease]]
- [[see_invisibility Invisibility]]

## Protective Aura

As a [[magic]] action, you can plant the haft end of the rod in the ground, whereupon the rod's head sheds [[bright_light Light]] in a 60-foot radius and [[dim_light Light]] for an additional 60 feet. While in that [[bright_light Light]], you and your allies gain a +1 bonus to [[armor_class Class]] and saving throws and can sense the location of any [[invisible]] creature that is also in the [[bright_light Light]].

The rod's head stops glowing and the effect ends after 10 minutes or when a creature takes a [[magic]] action to pull the rod from the ground. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.
